mission.title: clickhouse: feature request: EXPLAIN output
mission.description: feature request: EXPLAIN output. Requested by 40+ users.

steps.title: Check current ClickHouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your ClickHouse version:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
The EXPLAIN statement requires ClickHouse 20.6+.

steps.title: Review EXPLAIN output
steps.description:
ClickHouse added the `EXPLAIN` statement for query plan inspection:
- `EXPLAIN` / `EXPLAIN PLAN` - Logical query plan
- `EXPLAIN PIPELINE` - Execution pipeline
- `EXPLAIN AST` - Abstract syntax tree
- `EXPLAIN SYNTAX` - Optimized query after rewrites

steps.title: Use EXPLAIN to analyze queries
Verify EXPLAIN works
steps.description:
Run EXPLAIN on a query:
```sql
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM system.one;
```
You should see the execution plan with steps like ReadFromStorage, Expression, etc.

resolution.summary: ClickHouse implemented the EXPLAIN statement supporting EXPLAIN PLAN, EXPLAIN PIPELINE, EXPLAIN AST, and EXPLAIN SYNTAX modes.

prerequisites.description: A working ClickHouse installation (20.6+ for EXPLAIN support).
